column1: yoo whats up Ben its Spiffy with SpringBreak U! saw you filled out a form on our website. Were you looking to get situated for spring break?
okay dope. Cabo is a vibe for sure, a little more on the pricey side but a vibe
how many ppl in your group so far?
yea thats solid. all from the same school?
yo my b I missed your text somehow bro
Ill send these cabo details for the squad. is it cool if I send most of it through email? its a little long for text
wordd dope bro whats the best email to send to
also side note which week is your spring break? want to make sure I send the correct days
We would want to do march 9-13
okay dope. our main resort in Cabo has a requirement for one person in each room to be 21 for check in. are one of y'all 21+ ?
fire. will send this in a sec
just sent that over lmk if you got it
bett lmk what the group thinks
thats odd, looks like just the 4 night Cabo option isnt working. maybe it didnt paste in correctly
ill send it in a sec, made it for the exact 9-13 for you
heres the correct cabo 4 night. ill add it to the email thread as well https://secure.springbreaku.com/site/public/booking-quotes/CCXJZDXEF7

prices are the same regardless of the start date too. I know some of the others may have the 7th as a start date, we can still do the 9th and pricing will look identical for the 4 night and 5 night. just so you know
How would I add flights and the booze cruise??
yoo sorry I missed this last night, knocked right after I sent you that text
for flights, tbr, its a lot cheaper to get those separately on your own. I can help you find a good flight to buy tho, like on the side
and booze cruise I can add in! its $79 open bar good vibes
yoo Ben whats good, how we feeling about those options so far?
We are going to lock it in today
Bet bro. which option did we want to go with?
yoo which option did we wanna go with bro? I'll set up the reservation for you
I think now we want to do Cancun
okay cool bro. I can set up the reservation for you. still 3 ppl?
perfect I got you! we ready to get things secured right now?
cool lets do it. will send it over in 10
just emailed the reservation over for march 9-13. lmk if that came through!
Okay word we can do that
What's the difference between the three locations
And would it be cheaper to have your people
Not a huge difference between the 3. Cabo most expensive, little more luxury, Cancun is the big party destination, Punta Cana is the blend of both
A few dollars cheaper per perso with 4 than 3
Okay yeah I think we are looking at Cancun
Does the upgrade package include flights or just the booze cruise
Flights are cheaper to get separately on your own
I can help you find a good light to grab, like on the side
But you'll save like 150-200 this way
Did you already send the reservation email to me
yessir. I can resend it too
and which upgrade, like the party pass? did you want to add the 3 event pass to it? I can add it in for +$200
you have time to add the party pass in tho just a heads up. you get until 2 das before departure to add it on
What's are the details for the upgrades
yea lets not think of it as an upgrade
its a party package add on, its for access to the events off of the resort at the nightclubs we host at
comes with round trip coach bus transportation, express entry, cover charge, and open bar at our feature nightclub nights at Imagine Cave, Coco Bongo, Maroca Nightclub, and our Booxe Cruise event
you have an option to add each of them individually, or as that 3 event bundle you see at the bottom of the email
So how much would the 3 event be compared to just the booze cruise or the events individually
the Booze cruise is $75, Imagine Cave and Coco Bongo are $79 each, Maroca Nightclub is $69
yesssir round trip coach bus transportation, express entry, cover charge, and open bar
nah VIP you can upgrade to when you get to the club. like if you wanted a section and a bottle
Can we put our down payment for the trip today
yea lets run it. were you able to get onto the link above?
word lmk if you need any help getting on. follow the join this trip buttons, and then itll prompt you to create your secure account and make your deposit to lock it all in!
I made my account and it's asking for $630
Do I have to pay it in full or can I pay it in increments
should just be the $200 deposit. I'll check your account right now
I see Audrey in there but not yours
once you hit join trip and create your account, you'll see the first deposit is only 200
see you in there with the 630
yerr whats good brotha, whenever you guys can, if you can put in your flight info so we can schedule your airport transfers
Is it possible to get a refund on this trip due to all the riots with the cartel?
Ben whats up brotha. I def understand the concern, headlines can definitely sound alarming

At the moment there are no riots occurring in the Cancun hotel zone where our trips operate. The incidents circulating online are tied to other regions of Mexico and are not impacting the resort areas in Cancun
So right now all trips are currently operating as scheduled

if the squad is uncomfortable and doesnt want to travel we can definitely proceed with cancelling the trip. not sure if you each added the travel insurance plan, I can check. for a refund you'll submit a claim to Travel Insured
Do we pay the $51 for it today?
We do want to cancel we don't really feel comfortable going anymore
We made a claim and it was $51
Do you know when we would get refunded the trip money?
I hear you bro. no worries
so you were able to add the plan on through Travel Insured? is that all set
Do we add it on to get the refund?
Yup! heres the link to do so https://www.travelinsured.com/agency/
Is it for the group or does each person need to buy it?
yea each person will need their own insurance plan
Okay we all bought it and uploaded the insurance doc

Perfect bro can you have each person send an email just with a short request for cancellation of your trip. I do recommend waiting a day since you just added the insurance, just so that it doesn't look like you purchased it just to cancel
Up to you but it will definitely help your claim
Email me at spiffy@springbreaku.com. Schedule send it for early am is my recommendation
What should we say to request a cancellation so it doesn't make it seem like we bought it just to cancel?
And do we need to attach the insurance doc in the email?
Can keep it super simple and just say something along the lines of you are no longer able to attend and want to cancel your trip
They won't see this email unless they asked for it from us for proof so I wouldn't worry about it too much
No need to attach the insurance doc
Do we need to make the subject of the email anything specific
bet bro, will get this processed in the am and get you the documents you need to support your claim
And I believe Audrey and will have done the same thing. Would you like their email addresses to send them the documents as well?
yea she'll just have to send an email the same way you did
I know Will has sent it and I will make sure Audrey gets it done in the am.
word I dont think I got Will's yet. but just lmk
I know he sent it. Maybe it just hasn't gone through yet
okay will be on the lookout
